title: Sandstone Recycling
description: Recycle sandstone into sand and other recipes
body:
Recycle sandstone items back into sand! 

### Recycles to sand
- Sandstone blocks, slabs, stairs, walls
- Red sandstone blocks, slabs, stairs, walls
- Cut sandstone blocks, slabs
- Cut red sandstone blocks, slabs
- Chiseled sandstone blocks
- Chiseled red sandstone blocks

### Recycles to sandstone
- Sandstone stairs
- Sandstone slabs (side-by-side in crafting grid)
- Red sandstone stairs
- Red sandstone slabs (side-by-side in crafting grid)

### Recycles to smooth sandstone
- Smooth sandstone slabs, stairs
- Smooth red sandstone slabs, stairs

### Bonus recipes 
- Craft red sand using eight regular sand and one red dye
- Smelt sandstone slabs and stairs directly into their smooth sandstone variants
- Smelt red sandstone slabs and stairs directly into their smooth sandstone variants

### notblue's recycling packs
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
- [Better Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling)
- [Diamond Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diamond-recycling)
- [Leather Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/leather-recycling)
- [Netherite Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/netherite-recycling)

_Issues? Please report them on the [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/sandstone-recycling-1-20-1-21-1/) or [GitHub](https://github.com/not-blue/Sandstone-Recycling/issues)._
